[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101000111 5
1 1001101010 5
2 0100100001 3
3 0110000110 4
4 0101101101 6
5 1111001000 5
6 1011011010 6
7 0001010001 3
